## Checklist

- [ ] `pixi run ruff` passes (zero lint errors)
- [ ] `pixi run mypy` passes (strict, zero errors)
- [ ] `pixi run pytest` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any changed behaviour
- [ ] No direct commits to `main` — this branch is `feat/` or `fix/`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): description` convention
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour or public API changed
- [ ] No `print()` calls introduced — use `logging` instead
